title: 为虚拟机网络适配器设置静态 MAC 地址
output:
Created VM: WMITEST_mac_static 68A82D2E-FCFA-4D08-BD95-4C6A5007392B
Added NIC: WMITEST_NIC StaticMacAddress(initial)=False Address(initial)=000000000000
Readback: StaticMacAddress=True Address=00155D7A5C01
ASSERT PASS: static MAC set and persisted (StaticMacAddress=True, Address=00155D7A5C01)
Cleanup: DestroySystem rv=4096
Cleanup verified: no leftover
notes: StaticMacAddress 在 schema 上标记为只读(access=Read)，但可通过 Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.ModifyResourceSettings 修改并持久化，属于类定义中说明的标准例外。

不能直接使用 [wmiclass].CreateInstance() 构造 Msvm_SyntheticEthernetPortSettingData：这样得到的实例 ResourceType/ResourceSubType 为空，AddResourceSettings 会异步失败(JobState=10, ErrorCode=32773)。应从资源池获取默认 RASD：Msvm_ResourcePool(ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic Ethernet Port', Primordial=True) -> Msvm_AllocationCapabilities -> Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities(ValueRole=0) -> PartComponent。
在 PowerShell 5.1 中，[wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Class" 里 $ns 后紧跟的冒号会被解释为变量作用域，导致路径损坏。应写成 [wmiclass]("\\.\$ns"+":Class") 或使用 ${ns} 界定变量名。
Address 为 12 位十六进制、无分隔符(如 00155D7A5C01)；StaticMacAddress=true 时该 Address 即为固定 MAC，设为 false 则交回动态分配。
AddResourceSettings 的 OUT 参数为 ResultingResourceSettings(数组)；ModifyResourceSettings 同样返回修改后实例的路径，可直接以 [wmi] 取回读验证。
网络适配器未连接虚拟交换机时也可设置静态 MAC 地址。
title_en: Set a static MAC address on a virtual machine network adapter
notes_en: StaticMacAddress is marked read-only in the schema (access=Read), but it can be modified and persisted through Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.ModifyResourceSettings, which is a standard exception described in the class definition.

Do not construct Msvm_SyntheticEthernetPortSettingData directly with [wmiclass].CreateInstance(): the resulting instance has empty ResourceType/ResourceSubType, and AddResourceSettings will fail asynchronously (JobState=10, ErrorCode=32773). The default RASD should instead be obtained from the resource pool: Msvm_ResourcePool(ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic Ethernet Port', Primordial=True) -> Msvm_AllocationCapabilities -> Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities(ValueRole=0) -> PartComponent.

In PowerShell 5.1, the colon immediately following $ns in [wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Class" is interpreted as a variable scope, corrupting the path. It should be written as [wmiclass]("\\.\$ns"+":Class") or use ${ns} to delimit the variable name.

Address is 12 hexadecimal digits without separators (for example 00155D7A5C01); when StaticMacAddress=true this Address is the fixed MAC, and setting it to false returns the adapter to dynamic allocation.

The OUT parameter of AddResourceSettings is ResultingResourceSettings (an array); ModifyResourceSettings likewise returns the path of the modified instance, which can be fetched directly with [wmi] for read verification.
A static MAC address can also be set while the network adapter is not connected to a virtual switch.
